sealion-7.name: BYD SEALION 7
sealion-7.description: The SEALION 7 combines exceptional performance with advanced electric technology, offering a thrilling driving experience without compromise.

features.title: Dynamic SUV Design
features.subtitle: Sculpted for Performance
features.desc: The SEALION 7's bold exterior draws its energy from BYD's Ocean Aesthetics philosophy — sweeping lines, a sleek roofline, and muscular wheel arches create a presence that commands attention on every road.

features.title: Premium Interior
features.subtitle: First-Class Cabin
features.desc: Step inside the SEALION 7 and discover a thoughtfully crafted environment — panoramic sunroof, premium materials, and generous space for five passengers with 520L of boot space ready for adventure.

features.title: Blade Battery
features.subtitle: Long-Range Confidence
features.desc: BYD's 82.56 kWh Blade Battery is engineered for the long haul. Its cell-to-body integration lowers the centre of gravity and provides structural reinforcement while delivering up to 456 km of WLTP range.

features.title: Instant AWD Performance
features.subtitle: 0–100 km/h in 4.5 s
features.desc: Twin motors deliver 390 kW across all four wheels, launching the SEALION 7 from 0–100 km/h in just 4.5 seconds. BYD's iTAC torque vectoring responds in 10 ms — keeping you planted and in control.

features.title: DiLink & iTAC Technology
features.subtitle: Intelligent at Every Level
features.desc: The 15.6-inch rotating DiLink display and iTAC intelligent traction control system form the centrepiece of the SEALION 7's technology suite — connected, responsive, and constantly evolving via OTA updates.

seal.name: BYD SEAL
seal.description: A bold expression of BYD's Ocean Aesthetics design philosophy — where performance meets elegance in a stunning electric saloon.

features.title: Ocean Aesthetics
features.subtitle: Design Inspired by the Sea
features.desc: The SEAL's flowing lines draw inspiration from the ocean, embodying fluidity and grace. Every curve is sculpted with purpose, achieving a drag coefficient of just 0.219 Cd.

features.title: iTAC Technology
features.subtitle: Intelligent Traction Control
features.desc: BYD's patented Intelligent Torque Adaptation Control technology actively distributes torque between axles in as little as 10ms — 100x faster than traditional systems.

features.title: Cell-to-Body
features.subtitle: Structural Innovation
features.desc: The Blade Battery is integrated directly into the vehicle's floor, forming part of the structural body. This lowers the centre of gravity, improves rigidity, and maximises cabin space.

features.title: Instant electric performance
features.subtitle: 0–100 km/h in 3.8 s
features.desc: The SEAL's dual-motor AWD system delivers 390kW with iTAC torque vectoring responding in just 10ms — putting you in complete control on every corner.

features.title: DiLink Smart Cockpit
features.subtitle: Dynaudio & OTA Connected
features.desc: The 15.6-inch rotating DiLink display, Dynaudio 12-speaker system, and continuous OTA updates keep the SEAL at the forefront of the electric saloon segment.

seal-u.name: BYD SEAL U
seal-u.description: Spacious, capable, and technologically advanced — the SEAL U delivers everything a modern family needs in a premium electric SUV.

features.title: Family Space
features.subtitle: Generous & Versatile
features.desc: With 552L of boot space expandable to 1,440L with rear seats folded, the SEAL U adapts to every adventure. Thoughtful storage solutions are integrated throughout the cabin.

features.title: Smart Driving
features.subtitle: DiPilot Assistance
features.desc: DiPilot L2+ driver assistance keeps you safe and relaxed. Adaptive cruise, lane-keeping, automatic emergency braking, and 360° camera system work together seamlessly.

features.title: Blade Battery
features.subtitle: Long-lasting Power
features.desc: The 71.8 kWh Blade Battery provides exceptional range and safety. Its cell-level thermal management ensures optimal performance in all weather conditions.

features.title: Confident family driving
features.subtitle: 160 kW electric power
features.desc: The SEAL U's 160kW electric motor and precise DiPilot assistance deliver confident, refined performance for family journeys — with instant torque always on demand.

features.title: Smart family cockpit
features.subtitle: DiLink & Panoramic Roof
features.desc: A large touchscreen, panoramic roof, and BYD's DiLink ecosystem create a connected, spacious environment for every family member — whether commuting or exploring.

han.name: BYD HAN
han.description: Named after China's greatest dynasty, the HAN is BYD's flagship saloon — combining breathtaking performance with refined luxury.

features.title: Executive Presence
features.subtitle: Dragon Face Design
features.desc: The HAN's exterior is a masterclass in luxury automotive design. The iconic Dragon Face design language creates an imposing yet elegant silhouette that commands attention on every road.

features.title: Supreme Comfort
features.subtitle: First-Class Interior
features.desc: Nappa leather seating, panoramic sunroof, and ambient lighting create a sanctuary on wheels. The rear executive lounge offers airline-class legroom and massage seats.

features.title: Blade Battery
features.subtitle: 500+ km Confidence
features.desc: With 521km of WLTP range and 150kW DC fast charging, the HAN eliminates range anxiety entirely. Charge from 10–80% in under 35 minutes.

features.title: Executive acceleration
features.subtitle: 0–100 km/h in 3.9 s
features.desc: Twin motors produce 380kW and 700Nm of torque, propelling this executive saloon with sports car urgency while retaining the composure expected at the pinnacle of the segment.

features.title: DiLink & Dynaudio
features.subtitle: Luxury Tech Cockpit
features.desc: A 15.6-inch rotating DiLink display, Dynaudio 16-speaker premium audio, and over-the-air updates create an executive digital cockpit that evolves with you.

tang.name: BYD TANG
tang.description: Bold, powerful, and spacious — the TANG is engineered for those who refuse to compromise, offering 7-seat versatility and supercar acceleration.

features.title: 7-Seat Luxury
features.subtitle: Space for Everyone
features.desc: Three rows of premium seating with captain's chairs in row two and a fold-flat third row make the TANG the ultimate family SUV. Every passenger travels in first-class comfort.

features.title: AWD Performance
features.subtitle: Dual Motor Mastery
features.desc: Dual electric motors deliver 380kW of combined power, launching the TANG from 0–100km/h in just 4.6 seconds while maintaining superb composure across all terrains.

features.title: Intelligent Safety
features.subtitle: Five-Star Protection
features.desc: The TANG achieved 5-star ratings across all Euro NCAP categories. BYD's Blade Battery provides structural reinforcement while eliminating thermal runaway risk.

features.title: AWD performance
features.subtitle: 0–100 km/h in 4.6 s
features.desc: Dual motors drive all four wheels with 380kW of combined power, delivering supercar acceleration in a 7-seat family SUV — without compromising composure or efficiency.

features.title: Premium 7-seat tech
features.subtitle: DiLink & Panoramic Roof
features.desc: A 15.6-inch rotating display, captain's chairs in every row, and BYD's DiPilot driver assistance suite bring premium technology to all seven passengers.

dolphin.name: BYD DOLPHIN
dolphin.description: Smart, stylish, and surprisingly spacious — the DOLPHIN brings pure electric joy to the city and beyond at an accessible price.

features.title: Ocean Interior
features.subtitle: Playful by Design
features.desc: The DOLPHIN's interior is a celebration of creativity — inspired by ocean waves, with flowing surfaces, ambient lighting in 64 colours, and a floating central console.

features.title: Smart Efficiency
features.subtitle: More Range, Less Cost
features.desc: With up to 427km of WLTP range and low running costs, the DOLPHIN makes EV ownership effortless. 88kW DC fast charging gets you back on the road in no time.

features.title: Connected Tech
features.subtitle: DiLink Entertainment
features.desc: A 12.8-inch rotating display, over-the-air updates, and the full DiLink 300 ecosystem bring smartphone-level intelligence to your everyday drive.

features.title: Urban agility
features.subtitle: Fun to drive
features.desc: Nimble, responsive, and surprisingly quick — the DOLPHIN's 150kW motor delivers instant electric torque that makes every city journey feel like a joy ride.

features.title: Ocean-inspired cockpit
features.subtitle: 12.8" Rotating DiLink
features.desc: The 64-colour ambient lighting, 12.8-inch rotating DiLink display, and wave-inspired dashboard design create a playful, connected interior unlike anything else in its class.

dolphin-surf.name: BYD DOLPHIN SURF
dolphin-surf.description: Where urban agility meets weekend adventure — the DOLPHIN SURF brings a bold new shape to electric mobility.

features.title: Adventure Ready
features.subtitle: Go Anywhere
features.desc: Raised ride height, all-terrain capability, and robust exterior styling make the DOLPHIN SURF equally at home on city streets and weekend trails.

features.title: Bold Design
features.subtitle: Stand Out
features.desc: The DOLPHIN SURF's expressive exterior challenges convention with its adventure-inspired silhouette, bold roof rails, and muscular wheel arches.

features.title: Smart Interior
features.subtitle: Practical & Connected
features.desc: A thoughtfully designed interior with versatile storage, a 10.1-inch infotainment display, and DiLink connectivity keeps you organised and entertained.

features.title: Adventure agility
features.subtitle: 160 kW all-terrain electric
features.desc: Raised ride height and 160kW of instant electric torque give the DOLPHIN SURF the confidence to tackle weekend trails as effortlessly as city streets.

features.title: Adventure-ready cabin
features.subtitle: Practical meets connected
features.desc: Robust storage solutions, roof rails for gear, and DiLink connectivity make the DOLPHIN SURF the perfect companion for those who live life on the go.

atto-3-evo.name: BYD ATTO 3 EVO
atto-3-evo.description: The ATTO 3 EVO refines everything you loved about the original with enhanced range, upgraded technology, and a sharper design.

features.title: Evolved Design
features.subtitle: Sharper. Bolder.
features.desc: The ATTO 3 EVO's updated exterior features a redesigned front fascia, LED matrix headlights, and new alloy wheel options that bring a fresh energy to this popular SUV.

features.title: Interior Comfort
features.subtitle: Inspired by Sport & Fitness
features.desc: Unique elastic net door panels and sporty trim options create an interior like no other — ergonomically designed for the active lifestyle driver.

features.title: Enhanced Range
features.subtitle: Go Further
features.desc: With up to 420km WLTP range, the ATTO 3 EVO covers your daily commute and weekend escapes with ease — and charges rapidly when you need to top up.

features.title: Sporty urban drive
features.subtitle: 150 kW instant torque
features.desc: The ATTO 3 EVO's electric motor delivers instant torque for responsive city driving. With 0–100 km/h in 7.3 seconds, it brings genuine driving excitement to the compact SUV class.

features.title: Sport & fitness interior
features.subtitle: Unique elastic net design
features.desc: Elastic net door panels, sporty steering wheel stitching, and a 12.8-inch rotating DiLink display reflect the ATTO 3 EVO's active lifestyle DNA inside and out.

sealion-5-dm-i.name: BYD SEALION 5 DM-i
sealion-5-dm-i.description: The SEALION 5 DM-i combines BYD's revolutionary Super DM technology with a premium SUV body for exceptional efficiency and performance.

features.title: Super DM Technology
features.subtitle: Hybrid Reinvented
features.desc: BYD's fifth-generation Super DM system achieves an efficiency breakthrough — operating primarily as an electric vehicle for daily use, with the petrol engine as a seamless backup.

features.title: Dual Power Modes
features.subtitle: EV or Hybrid
features.desc: Drive in pure EV mode for up to 100km, or let the intelligent hybrid system seamlessly blend petrol and electric power for extended journeys with minimal fuel consumption.

features.title: Premium SUV
features.subtitle: Style & Space
features.desc: Premium exterior design with a spacious, well-equipped interior. The SEALION 5 DM-i doesn't compromise on luxury while delivering class-leading hybrid efficiency.

features.title: Super DM performance
features.subtitle: 0–100 km/h in 5.9 s
features.desc: 259kW of combined system power launches the SEALION 5 DM-i with authority. The intelligent Super DM system seamlessly manages power delivery for thrilling yet efficient progress.

features.title: Hybrid intelligence
features.subtitle: EV-first driving
features.desc: The DiLink cockpit displays real-time energy flow between battery and engine, while DiPilot driver assistance keeps every journey safe and stress-free.

seal-u-dm-i.name: BYD SEAL U DM-i
seal-u-dm-i.description: The SEAL U DM-i brings BYD's Super DM hybrid mastery to a spacious family SUV — impressive EV range with the reassurance of a petrol backup.

features.title: Super DM Hybrid
features.subtitle: Best of Both Worlds
features.desc: The fifth-generation Super DM system delivers exceptional electric-first driving with seamless hybrid operation. Over 1,000km of combined range eliminates range anxiety completely.

features.title: Family Space
features.subtitle: Room for Everything
features.desc: Generous cabin dimensions, 552L of boot space, and a panoramic glass roof make the SEAL U DM-i the ideal companion for family adventures near and far.

features.title: Smart Technology
features.subtitle: Always Connected
features.desc: DiLink 100 infotainment, DiPilot driver assistance, and over-the-air updates keep the SEAL U DM-i at the cutting edge throughout your ownership.

features.title: Hybrid family performance
features.subtitle: 1,000+ km combined range
features.desc: With 233kW of system power and over 1,000km of total range, the SEAL U DM-i handles school runs and long-distance road trips equally — without a second thought.

features.title: Family hybrid cockpit
features.subtitle: DiLink & energy management
features.desc: A large DiLink display shows live energy flow, charging status, and navigation — keeping the whole family informed and comfortable on every journey.

seal-6-dm-i.name: BYD SEAL 6 DM-i
seal-6-dm-i.description: The SEAL 6 DM-i merges the elegant design of the SEAL saloon with BYD's Super DM hybrid technology for an extraordinary driving experience.

features.title: Super DM Performance
features.subtitle: Hybrid Power Unleashed
features.desc: The Super DM system's combination of a turbocharged petrol engine and high-output electric motors delivers 316kW of total power with sub-5.4-second 0–100km/h acceleration.

features.title: 120+ km EV Range
features.subtitle: Electric-First Daily Driving
features.desc: With over 120km of pure electric range, most drivers will rarely use petrol for daily commutes. The intelligent energy management system maximises efficiency at all times.

features.title: Ocean Aesthetics
features.subtitle: Saloon Elegance
features.desc: The SEAL 6's flowing saloon silhouette and premium interior appointments create a refined environment that rivals dedicated luxury marques at a fraction of the cost.

features.title: Executive hybrid thrust
features.subtitle: 0–100 km/h in 5.4 s
features.desc: 316kW of combined power from the Super DM system propels this premium saloon with executive authority — fast enough to excite, refined enough to impress.

features.title: Dynaudio cockpit
features.subtitle: 15.6" Rotating & V2L
features.desc: The 15.6-inch rotating DiLink display, Dynaudio 12-speaker system, and Vehicle-to-Load capability elevate the SEAL 6 DM-i into genuine luxury hybrid territory.

seal-6-dm-i-touring.name: BYD SEAL 6 DM-i TOURING
seal-6-dm-i-touring.description: The SEAL 6 DM-i TOURING extends the acclaimed saloon's virtues into a practical and elegant estate body — perfect for those who need space without sacrificing style.

features.title: Estate Versatility
features.subtitle: More Space. Same Power.
features.desc: The TOURING's estate body adds 570L of boot space, expandable to 1,480L. Roof rails, a hands-free tailgate, and a flat load floor make it the practical choice without compromise.

features.title: Super DM System
features.subtitle: Effortless Performance
features.desc: Sharing the SEAL 6 saloon's 316kW Super DM system, the TOURING delivers performance to match its practicality — covering 0–100km/h in just 5.4 seconds.

features.title: Premium Interior
features.subtitle: Long-Journey Comfort
features.desc: Heated and ventilated front seats, a panoramic sunroof, and premium Dynaudio sound system transform every journey into a first-class experience.

features.title: Estate hybrid performance
features.subtitle: 0–100 km/h in 5.4 s
features.desc: 316kW of Super DM power in a practical estate body — the SEAL 6 DM-i TOURING proves that family practicality and thrilling performance are not mutually exclusive.

features.title: Grand touring technology
features.subtitle: Dynaudio & 120+ km EV range
features.desc: The rotating DiLink display, Dynaudio audio system, and V2L capability make every long journey a premium experience — whether cruising on battery or engine power.

atto-2-dm-i.name: BYD ATTO 2 DM-i
atto-2-dm-i.description: The ATTO 2 DM-i brings BYD's Super DM efficiency to a compact package — ideal for city life with impressive electric range and low running costs.

features.title: City Smart
features.subtitle: Urban Excellence
features.desc: The ATTO 2 DM-i's compact dimensions make it nimble in city traffic while the Super DM system ensures you spend more time driving and less time at the fuel pump.

features.title: Efficient Hybrid
features.subtitle: 4.9L/100km
features.desc: At just 4.9L/100km in hybrid mode and 80+ km EV range, the ATTO 2 DM-i sets a new benchmark for efficiency in the compact SUV segment.

features.title: Modern Interior
features.subtitle: Smart & Stylish
features.desc: A clean, modern interior with a large central display, wireless phone charging, and multiple connectivity options keeps you comfortable and connected.

features.title: Compact hybrid agility
features.subtitle: 195 kW Super DM power
features.desc: 195kW of combined system power gives the ATTO 2 DM-i surprising punch for a compact city car — pulling away from traffic with confident, instant electric torque.

features.title: Smart city cockpit
features.subtitle: 12.8" Rotating & V2L
features.desc: The rotating 12.8-inch DiLink display, wireless charging, and V2L capability pack flagship technology into the ATTO 2 DM-i's compact footprint.
